content.text:
projections:
  - position: 1
    system: "elastic"
    template: "doc-fetch-falco-alert / falco-container-timeline / launch-network-tool-container / container-timeline-summary"
    events:
      - agent:
          name: "soc-playground"
          id: "<agent-id>"
          type: "filebeat"
          ephemeral_id: "<ephemeral-id>"
          version: "8.13.0"
        log:
          file:
            path: "/var/log/falco/falco_alerts.json"
          offset: 0
        elastic_agent:
          id: "<elastic-agent-id>"
          version: "8.13.0"
          snapshot: false
        message: "Warning Launch Suspicious Network Tool in Container: A network tool (nc) was run inside a container. container=ffbff1299702 image=<container-image> proc=nc cmdline=nc -zv 172.18.0.24 <port> user=<username> tty=0"
        cloud:
          availability_zone: "<availability-zone>"
          instance:
            name: "soc-playground"
            id: "<instance-id>"
          provider: "<provider>"
          service:
            name: "<service-name>"
          region: "<region>"
        input:
          type: "log"
        "@timestamp": "2026-06-04T14:00:54.976Z"
        ecs:
          version: "8.11.0"
        data_stream:
          namespace: "default"
          type: "logs"
          dataset: "falco.alerts"
        falco:
          output: "Warning Launch Suspicious Network Tool in Container: A network tool (nc) was run inside a container. container=ffbff1299702 image=<container-image> proc=nc cmdline=nc -zv 172.18.0.24 <port> user=<username> tty=0"
          output_fields:
            "user.uid": 1009
            "proc.pname": "bash"
            "evt.type": "connect"
            "proc.cmdline": "nc -zv 172.18.0.24 <port>"
            "user.name": "<username>"
            "proc.exepath": "/usr/bin/nc"
            "container.id": "ffbff1299702"
            "evt.arg.flags": "MSG_NOSIGNAL"
            "user.loginuid": 1009
            "container.name": "<container-name>"
            "container.image.repository": null
            "proc.name": "nc"
            "proc.tty": 0
            "evt.time": 1749045654976000000
          hostname: "soc-playground"
          rule: "Launch Suspicious Network Tool in Container"
          source: "syscall"
          time: "2026-06-04T14:00:54.976Z"
          priority: "Warning"
          tags:
            - "network"
            - "container"
            - "mitre_discovery"
        host:
          hostname: "soc-playground"
          os:
            kernel: "<kernel>"
            codename: "<codename>"
            name: "Ubuntu"
            family: "debian"
            type: "linux"
            version: "<version>"
            platform: "ubuntu"
          containerized: false
          ip:
            - "172.18.0.1"
          name: "soc-playground"
          id: "<host-id>"
          mac:
            - "<mac>"
          architecture: "x86_64"
        event:
          agent_id_status: "verified"
          ingested: "2026-06-04T14:00:56.000Z"
          dataset: "falco.alerts"
      - agent:
          name: "soc-playground"
          id: "<agent-id>"
          type: "filebeat"
          ephemeral_id: "<ephemeral-id>"
          version: "8.13.0"
        log:
          file:
            path: "/var/log/falco/falco_alerts.json"
          offset: 0
        elastic_agent:
          id: "<elastic-agent-id>"
          version: "8.13.0"
          snapshot: false
        message: "Warning Launch Suspicious Network Tool in Container: A network tool (nc) was run inside a container. container=ffbff1299702 image=<container-image> proc=nc cmdline=nc -zv <health-check-target> <health-check-port> user=<username> tty=0"
        cloud:
          availability_zone: "<availability-zone>"
          instance:
            name: "soc-playground"
            id: "<instance-id>"
          provider: "<provider>"
          service:
            name: "<service-name>"
          region: "<region>"
        input:
          type: "log"
        "@timestamp": "2026-06-04T13:57:20.000Z"
        ecs:
          version: "8.11.0"
        data_stream:
          namespace: "default"
          type: "logs"
          dataset: "falco.alerts"
        falco:
          output: "Warning Launch Suspicious Network Tool in Container: A network tool (nc) was run inside a container. container=ffbff1299702 image=<container-image> proc=nc cmdline=nc -zv <health-check-target> <health-check-port> user=<username> tty=0"
          output_fields:
            "user.uid": 1009
            "proc.pname": "bash"
            "evt.type": "connect"
            "proc.cmdline": "nc -zv <health-check-target> <health-check-port>"
            "user.name": "<username>"
            "proc.exepath": "/usr/bin/nc"
            "container.id": "ffbff1299702"
            "evt.arg.flags": "MSG_NOSIGNAL"
            "user.loginuid": 1009
            "container.name": "<container-name>"
            "container.image.repository": null
            "proc.name": "nc"
            "proc.tty": 0
            "evt.time": 1749045440000000000
          hostname: "soc-playground"
          rule: "Launch Suspicious Network Tool in Container"
          source: "syscall"
          time: "2026-06-04T13:57:20.000Z"
          priority: "Warning"
          tags:
            - "network"
            - "container"
            - "mitre_discovery"
        host:
          hostname: "soc-playground"
          os:
            kernel: "<kernel>"
            codename: "<codename>"
            name: "Ubuntu"
            family: "debian"
            type: "linux"
            version: "<version>"
            platform: "ubuntu"
          containerized: false
          ip:
            - "172.18.0.1"
          name: "soc-playground"
          id: "<host-id>"
          mac:
            - "<mac>"
          architecture: "x86_64"
        event:
          agent_id_status: "verified"
          ingested: "2026-06-04T13:57:22.000Z"
          dataset: "falco.alerts"

  - position: 2
    system: "elastic"
    template: "doc-fetch-by-id / redirect-connections / ip-to-host-search / falco-container-timeline / host-agent-by-ip"
    events:
      - agent:
          name: "soc-playground"

        elastic_agent:
          id: "<elastic-agent-id>"
          version: "8.13.0"
          snapshot: false
        message: "Warning Launch Suspicious Network Tool in Container: A network tool (nc) was run inside a container. container=ffbff1299702 image=<container-image> proc=nc cmdline=nc -zv 172.18.0.24 <port> user=<username> tty=0"
        cloud:

          instance:
            name: "soc-playground"
            id: "<instance-id>"
          provider: "<provider>"

        input:

        "@timestamp": "2026-06-04T14:00:54.976Z"
        ecs:

        data_stream:

        falco:

          output_fields:
            "user.uid": 1009
            "proc.pname": "bash"
            "evt.type": "connect"
            "proc.cmdline": "nc -zv 172.18.0.24 <port>"
            "user.name": "<username>"
            "proc.exepath": "/usr/bin/nc"
            "container.id": "ffbff1299702"
            "evt.arg.flags": "MSG_NOSIGNAL"
            "user.loginuid": 1009
            "container.name": "<container-name>"
            "container.image.repository": null
            "proc.name": "nc"
            "proc.tty": 0
            "evt.time": 1749045654976000000
          hostname: "soc-playground"
          rule: "Launch Suspicious Network Tool in Container"
          source: "syscall"
          time: "2026-06-04T14:00:54.976Z"
          priority: "Warning"
          tags:
            - "network"
            - "container"
        host:
          hostname: "soc-playground"
          os:
            kernel: "<kernel>"
            codename: "<codename>"
            name: "Ubuntu"
            family: "debian"
            type: "linux"
            version: "<version>"
            platform: "ubuntu"
          containerized: false
          ip:
            - "172.18.0.1"
          name: "soc-playground"
          id: "<host-id>"
          mac:
            - "<mac>"
          architecture: "x86_64"
        event:
          agent_id_status: "verified"
          ingested: "2026-06-04T14:00:56.000Z"
          dataset: "falco.alerts"
      - agent:
          name: "soc-playground"
          id: "<agent-id>"
          type: "filebeat"
          ephemeral_id: "<ephemeral-id>"
          version: "8.13.0"
        log:
          file:
            path: "/var/log/falco/falco_alerts.json"
          offset: 0
        elastic_agent:
          id: "<elastic-agent-id>"
          version: "8.13.0"
          snapshot: false
        message: "Warning Write below monitored dir: A write occurred to authorized_keys in container ffbff1299702. container=ffbff1299702 proc=bash cmdline=bash user=<username> tty=0 file=/root/.ssh/authorized_keys"
        cloud:
          availability_zone: "<availability-zone>"
          instance:
            name: "soc-playground"
            id: "<instance-id>"
          provider: "<provider>"
          service:
            name: "<service-name>"
          region: "<region>"
        input:
          type: "log"
        "@timestamp": "2026-06-04T14:02:10.000Z"
        ecs:
          version: "8.11.0"
        data_stream:
          namespace: "default"
          type: "logs"
          dataset: "falco.alerts"
        falco:
          output: "Warning Write below monitored dir: A write occurred to authorized_keys in container ffbff1299702. proc=bash cmdline=bash user=<username> tty=0 file=/root/.ssh/authorized_keys"
          output_fields:
            "user.uid": 1009
            "proc.pname": "bash"
            "evt.type": "write"
            "proc.cmdline": "bash"
            "user.name": "<username>"
            "proc.exepath": "/bin/bash"
            "container.id": "ffbff1299702"
            "evt.arg.flags": "O_WRONLY|O_APPEND"
            "user.loginuid": 1009
            "container.name": "<container-name>"
            "container.image.repository": null
            "proc.name": "bash"
            "proc.tty": 0
            "evt.time": 1749045730000000000
          hostname: "soc-playground"
          rule: "Modify Shell Configuration File"
          source: "syscall"
          time: "2026-06-04T14:02:10.000Z"
          priority: "Warning"
          tags:
            - "filesystem"
            - "container"
            - "mitre_persistence"
        host:
          hostname: "soc-playground"
          os:
            kernel: "<kernel>"
            codename: "<codename>"
            name: "Ubuntu"
            family: "debian"
            type: "linux"
            version: "<version>"
            platform: "ubuntu"
          containerized: false
          ip:
            - "172.18.0.1"
          name: "soc-playground"
          id: "<host-id>"
          mac:
            - "<mac>"
          architecture: "x86_64"
        event:
          agent_id_status: "verified"
          ingested: "2026-06-04T14:02:12.000Z"
          dataset: "falco.alerts"

  - position: 3
    system: "host-state"
    template: "container-identity-and-uid / container-metadata / container-docker-inspect / proc-tree-full"
    events:
      - container_id: "ffbff1299702"
        container_name: "<container-name>"
        image: "<container-image>"
        uid: 1009
        username: "<username>"
        account_type: "service"
        service_label: "svc.monitoring"
        proc_tree:
          - pid: 1
            name: "bash"
            cmdline: "bash"
            tty: 0
            ppid: 0
            parent_name: "docker-init"
          - pid: 142
            name: "bash"
            cmdline: "bash"
            tty: 0
            ppid: 1
            parent_name: "bash"
          - pid: 143
            name: "nc"
            cmdline: "nc -zv 172.18.0.24 <port>"
            tty: 0
            ppid: 142
            parent_name: "bash"
